name: igotu
description: IGOTU - I Got You | 一站式抑郁应对平台

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,green "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.start: npm run install:all && npm run dev
scripts.reset: cd backend && rm -f igotu.db && echo '🗑️ 数据库已重置，重启后自动重建'
